# Site Gaspar - Workspace Instructions

## Project Overview
Portuguese business website template for professional services. Clean, responsive design with WhatsApp integration.

## Technology Stack
- HTML5
- CSS3
- Static Website (no build process required)

## Key Features
- Responsive gallery section
- WhatsApp contact integration
- Testimonials section
- Professional styling

## To Run
1. Open `index.html` in a web browser or use VS Code Live Server extension
2. Update placeholders with actual business details
3. Replace placeholder images with real portfolio images

## File Structure
```
site gaspar/
├── index.html       (Main website template)
├── README.md        (Project documentation)
└── .github/
    └── copilot-instructions.md
```
